name: The Probability of Backtest Overfitting
snippet:
2015 · Cited by 312 — We show that CSCV produces accurate estimates of the probability that a particular backtest is over-fit.
We propose a framework that estimates the probability of backtest over-fitting (PBO) we call combinatorially symmetric cross-validation (CSCV).
